_meta.what: DEV-OWNED source of truth for the OWISMIND_PROD_V1 agent system: project key, real DSS ids, dataset names, semantic model + tool bindings, fast-lookup config, guardrails. Mirrors CAPABILITIES in OWISMIND_PROD_V1_OWIsMind_orchestrator.py.
_meta.project_is: the PRODUCTION project. Do NOT develop here. Build + validate in OWISMIND_DEV, then promote the SAME change here with the PROD ids in this file. See ../README.md for the promotion runbook.
_meta.not_runtime: NOT imported at runtime. CAPABILITIES is inlined in the orchestrator; keep this file in sync by hand.

business_domains.note: Domains OWI cares about. A domain is 'staffed' when an enabled agent declares it; otherwise the orchestrator says honestly 'no agent for it yet'. tickets is intentionally UNSTAFFED in PROD until the DEV tickets agent is finished and promoted.
business_domains.tickets: unstaffed (built in DEV, not yet promoted to PROD)
